title: Click Enchanting
description: No anvil-ation without representation (enchant in your inventory)!
body:
# Click Enchanting
Ever wanted to enchant in your inventory? Well, now you can!
# Features (`click_enchant.use`)
## Enchant (`click_enchant.enchant`)
Notice that when the book is picked up, there is a preview for xp cost!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zgQg0cV3Y9I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4asxFd5inrU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Un-enchant (`click_enchant.unenchant`)
A book is needed!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/16HBbwqeIDM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
